main.description: A declaration of a related group of map layers for an organization site. Groups can model stacks, time series, or catalogs of related layers.

name.description: Display name for the layer group

description.description: Description of the layer group, its purpose, or how the contained layers should be interpreted

siteRef.description: AT-URI reference to the site this layer group belongs to

groupType.description: How the related layers should be interpreted by clients

createdAt.description: The date and time of the creation of the record

updatedAt.description: The date and time this layer group metadata was last updated

category.description: Layer group category for grouping in UI (e.g., 'Biodiversity', 'Land Cover', 'Climate', 'Infrastructure')

isDefault.description: Whether this layer group should be shown by default

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail for the layer group

temporalResolution.description: Expected time step for time-series layer groups

timeZone.description: IANA time zone used for temporal labels or capture times, if different from UTC

bounds.description: Bounding box for the grouped layers as 'west,south,east,north'

dataSource.description: Attribution/source shared by the grouped layer data

dataDate.description: Date or date range of the grouped data (ISO 8601 recommended)

layers.description: Ordered references to layers in this group. For stacks, order controls rendering. For time series, capturedAt/validFrom/validTo/sequence control scrubbing.

layerItem.description: A layer reference inside a layer group, with optional ordering, rendering, and temporal metadata

layerRef.description: AT-URI reference to an app.gainforest.organization.layer record

label.description: Display label for this layer within the group

role.description: Rendering role of this layer within the group

displayOrder.description: Ordering priority inside the group. For stacks, lower values render first.

isDefault.description: Whether this layer should be initially enabled when the group is loaded

opacity.description: Opacity override for this layer within the group (0-1 as string, e.g., '0.7')

capturedAt.description: When the source data for this layer was captured or observed

validFrom.description: Start of the time interval represented by this layer

validTo.description: End of the time interval represented by this layer

sequence.description: Sequence index for ordered or time-scrubbable layers when timestamps are absent or equal

timeLabel.description: Human-readable temporal label for this layer in scrubbers (e.g., 'Jan 2025')

styleOverrides.description: JSON-encoded rendering overrides for this layer within the group
